text: Stepping into this space, I am enveloped by the hum of innovation and anticipation. The vivid neon glow through the glass hints at hidden creativity and research unfolding within. I sense I'm at a threshold — outside, all is sterile and orderly; inside promises curiosity and restless thought. The lines blur between observation and participation, making me feel both an outsider and a possible catalyst for whatever ideas are blossoming beyond the transparent divide.
